title: agrostis capillaris var. alpigena
intro: Agrostis capillaris var. alpigena, also known as alpine bent or alpine hair grass, is a subspecies of the Agrostis capillaris plant, a perennial grass native to Europe and Asia. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been found to have potential health benefits in treating conditions such as arthritis and skin irritations. The health benefits of Agrostis capillaris var. alpigena include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and is also used in some herbal remedies as a dried powder or extract.
